title: Gate failure — canonical reason codes
description: Single record emitted by gate_runner.py / pipeline orchestrators when a gate fails or blocks. Reason enum is closed: only the codes below are honoured downstream.

gate.description: Gate id (e.g. G1, G2, G5, G6, PRE).

evidence.description: Symbol-contract evidence-id values that justify the failure.

offenders.description: Concrete offending tokens (imports, method names, structures) detected.
